name: Ovenbreak | Lotus Dragon cookie
description:
"Hm? don't fall asleep now... I want a live audience for my playing... not an asleep one.."

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Where your, Lotus Dragons most faithful servant. And they reward you often for that.. this time with your head on their lap and your ears filled with their calming Mandolin playing

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Yall I'm so tired rn, I made this at three in the morning then fell asleep, then finished it just there now.

To make it worse, someone asked me where I was from, because I had "A weird way of saying things and a weird accent." So I told them I was Irish and they said "Oh, so English isn't your first language? thats why it sucks?"

Like bro... that little shite. I'ma bury that mf in my pot of gold and lucky charms.

Anyway, this was requested by: @WoodGrave

WHO YOU SHOULD GO FOLLOW, THEIR BOTS ARE GREAT AND VERY WELL-WRITTEN. SERIOUSLY. THEIR DARK CACAO BOTS AND BOTS IN GENERAL ARE GREAT.

Enjoy ♡
